message:
✨ Auto-inject demo mode flag into all stat blocks (#453)

Modify createMergedStatValueGetter to automatically add isDemo: true
to all stat values when in demo mode. This ensures all dashboards
show the yellow demo indicator on stat blocks without requiring
individual dashboard changes.

Previously only 2/20 dashboards had demo flags on their stats.
Now all 20+ dashboards automatically get demo mode support.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
